/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/C_GrafEQ.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/C_GrafEQ.dir/value.cpp.o CMakeFiles/C_GrafEQ.dir/prog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/C_GrafEQ.dir/prog1.cpp.o -o C_GrafEQ -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/flint/3.5.0/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/mpfr/4.2.2/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/flint/3.5.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/mpfr/4.2.2/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib -lflint -lmpfr -lgmp -framework OpenGL
